characters.name: Agnes Andrews
characters.description: Agnes AndrewsGeneral OverviewFull name:Agnes AndrewsNickname(s):AgsBirthplace:New York, NYBirthday:1993Residence:Manhattan, New YorkRelationshipsFamily:Unknown MotherRomances:Max(boyfriend)Friends:Jenny Humphrey(formerly)Enemies:Jenny HumphreySeries InformationStatus:AliveFirst Appearance:Pret-a-Poor-JLast Appearance:New York, I Love You XOXOPortrayed By:Willa Holland Agnes Andrewsis a recurring character in theGossip Girl television series. She is portrayed byWilla Holland. Agenes is introduced inPret-a-Poor-Jas a model forEleanor Waldorf. She meetsJenny Humphrey, who is interning at the atelier, and they begin to strike up a friendship. They hang out after work at a bar, and Agnes is impressed with Jenny's outfit. They trade clothes, but Jenny realizes this is a mistake when Agnes leaves in the outfit she needs to duplicate for Eleanor. The next day, Agnes shows up at the atelier and shows Jenny photos her boyfriend, Max, took of them. She encourages her to leave Eleanor, since she's trying to steal Jenny's designs, and Jenny does so. They meet up later after she has quit, and they go back to Agnes' to hang out. They end up dancing in only their bras, but the fun is short lived whenNate Archibaldarrives to take Jenny home.

characters.name: Aki Menzies
characters.description: Aki MenziesSeason 2Season 1General OverviewFull name:Akeno MenziesNickname(s):Ak,Dr. Menzies,Keno(by Audrey),A,Penthouse PrinceBirthplace:Manhattan,New York City, NYBirthday:July 27, 2005Occupation(s):StudentResidence:432 Park AvenueInstagram:@akimenzRelationshipsFamily:Roger Menzies(father)Jody Menzies(mother)Hamish Menzies(older half-brother)Jake Menzies(older half-brother)Eliza Menzies(older half-sister)Romances:Audrey Hope(girlfriend)Max Wolfe(boyfriend)Rex Huntington(kissed)Jamison(threesome)Ingrid(kissed)Friends:Obie Bergmann IV(best friend)Julien CallowayMonet de HaanLuna LaZoya LottEnemies:Rafa CaparrosSeries InformationStatus:AliveFirst Appearance:Just Another Girl on the MTAPortrayed By:Evan Mock  Akeno "Aki" Menziesis a main character in theGossip Girl revival.He is portrayed byEvan Mock. Aki is one of the more soft-spoken and amiable members of the friend group. While not as socially conscious as Obie, he is kind to new faces and tries to see other people's perspectives even when his friends and girlfriend are not as sympathetic. He defended Julien when his friends were upset that she kept her plans with Zoya a secret from them and tried to get Audrey to see things from her mother's point of view despite knowing of their strained relationship. His objective advice and therapist-like perspective has earned him the teasing nickname, "Dr. Menzies," as well as Audrey's occasional annoyance. He prefers to give attention rather than receive it. He is very comfortable with public displays of affection with both Audrey and Max but avoids things he believes would make him "stick out." He regularly makes movie references and is often seen with his skateboard.

characters.name: Alessandra Steele
characters.description: Alessandra SteeleGeneral OverviewFull name:Alessandra SteeleRelationshipsRomances:Chuck Bass(fling)Friends:Dan Humphrey(friend and former client)Series InformationStatus:AliveFirst Appearance:The Jewel of DenialLast Appearance:Raiders of the Lost ArtPortrayed By:Marina SquerciatiAlessandra Steelsis a recurring character in thefifth seasonof theGossip Girltelevision adaptation. She is portrayed by Marina Squerciati. Alessandra is introduced inThe Jewel of Denial, when Dan's old mentor Noah Shapiro introduces them at his office. Dan is looking for advice on how to handle the upcoming release ofInside,and Noah advises him to just let it come out without making a fuss. When Dan later returns to the office, Alessandra lets it slip that Noah is planning to take credit for writingInside.In an attempt to stop him, Dan crashes his dinner and learns it was all a ruse to get him to take credit for his own work. InMemoirs of an Invisible Dan, Alessandra sets up Dan's book release party, where she meetsRufus,Lily,Chuck,Serena,Blair, andLouis. Once everyone abandons Dan, she introduces him to the press. She later gets Dan an interview with New York 1 and is able to get Harvey Weinstein interested in the movie rights, but they lose after Serena sabotages their plans (The Fasting and the Furious). InRhodes to Perdition, Dan spends hours arguing with an online Twitter hater and eventually decides to track them down. He finds the address attached to the account is Alessandra's, and that she started the account to drum up book sales. After they talk, they sit side by side and take turns being the hater and the lover ofInside.At Chuck's Valentine's Day party, a drunken Alessandra attempts to flirt with him but he rejects her. However, he changes his mind and hooks up with her after seeing a picture of Blair kissing Dan (Crazy Cupid Love). After their initial hookup, they continue to do so as Chuck is looking for a way to destroy Dan. He sends her a chanteuse scarf and upon visiting her office, seduces her into sends Dan's proposal on to the editor without reading it. After they hook up, she learns that the proposal the editor received was a plagiarized book and she hurries to tell Dan. She instructs him to go home and rewrite his proposal as fast as he can to avoid being dropped, and he notices her scarf. She doesn't say who it's from, but Dan quickly figures out it was from Chuck (Cross Rhodes). InRaiders of the Lost Art, Alessandra tells Dan that her friend Lucia has a surprise for him and asks him to cancel his lunch plans with Blair to meet with her. When he does, he learns that Lucia is inviting him to The Writer's Institute in Rome, Italy for the summer. However, Dan is insecure over his relationship with Blair and declines. InThe Fugitives, Alessandra calls Dan to try and convince him to take the fellowship in Rome, Italy over the summer.

characters.name: Alison Humphrey
characters.description: Alison HumphreyGeneral OverviewFull name:AlisonNickname(s):AlBirthplace:New York City, NY(possibly)RelationshipsFamily:Dan Humphrey(son)Jenny Humphrey(daughter)Serena van der Woodsen(daughter-in-law)Romances:Rufus Humphrey(ex-husband)Alexander Bancroft(boyfriend)Enemies:Lily van der WoodsenSeries InformationStatus:AliveFirst Appearance:Seventeen CandlesLast Appearance:Roman HolidayPortrayed By:Susan MisnerAlison Humphrey(namedJeanettein the novels) is a recurring character in theGossip Gossip Girl novelsand itstelevision adaptation. She is the ex-wife ofRufus Humphreyand the mother ofDanandJenny Humphrey. She is portrayed bySusan Misner. Alexander Bancroft(boyfriend) In the books, Alison is named Jeannette.Jeannetteis the mother ofDanandJennyand the ex-wife ofRufus Humphrey. She used to be a hippie artist in the past. She permanently left the family home when her children were still very young to settle inPrague, where she married a wealthy aristocrat. She didn’t stay much in touch with her children, only sending them odd presents or writing them letter a few times a year, until the famous summer afterDan’s senior year, during which she hostedJennyso they could attend an art workshop together. She then decided to visit her son inNew Yorkto encourage him after his recent, temporary coming-out. She is a kept woman with a bit of a hippie side, an eccentric and exuberant socialite with an open mind. All she does all day is shop, eat, drink and paint pictures of flowers, letting her husband dress her and put her up in hotels all over Europe. She has long, dull chestnut hair streaked with gray and pale blue eyes.

characters.name: Anne Archibald
characters.description: Anne ArchibaldGeneral OverviewFull name:Anne Archibald (née van der Bilt)Birthplace:New York City, NY(possibly)RelationshipsFamily:Howard Archibald(ex-husband; 1 child)Nathaniel "Nate" Archibald(son, withHoward)William van der Bilt I(father)William van der Bilt II(brother)William "Tripp" van der Bilt III(nephew)Romances:Howard Archibald(ex-husband)Friends:Eleanor WaldorfLily van der WoodsenSeries InformationStatus:AliveFirst Appearance:The Handmaiden's TaleLast Appearance:Petty in PinkPortrayed By:Francie Swift Anne Archibald(néevan der Bilt) is a recurring character in theGossip Girl series of novelsand it'stelevision adaptation. She is the ex wife ofHoward "The Captain" Archibaldand the mother ofNate Archibald. She is portrayed byFrancie Swift. In the novels, Anne is known asMrs. Archibald. Mrs Archinald isNate’s mother andCaptain Archibald's wife. She is a very wealthy and attractive French aristocrat whose family owns a castle in Nice (France). She now resides with her son and her husband in a townhouse of Park Avenue on the UES. She is exuberant, theatrical and melodramatic, prone to emotional outbursts, yet she is also a loving and affectionate—if somewhat absent—mother. She is very fond of gossip. She has a sister who resides in Monaco.

characters.name: Audrey Hope
characters.description: Audrey HopeSeason 2Season 1General OverviewFull name:Audrey HopeNickname(s):Audge, A, Aud, HopeBirthplace:Manhattan, NYBirthday:August 24Occupation(s):StudentResidence:Upper East SideInstagram:@audreyhopesforRelationshipsFamily:Katherine Hope(mother)William Hope(father)Romances:Aki Menzies(boyfriend)Max Wolfe(boyfriend)Jamison(hook-up)Friends:Julien Calloway(best friend)Luna LaAki MenziesMax WolfeObie Bergmann IVZoya LottMonet de HaanEnemies:Jessica Bradley(stepmother)Series InformationStatus:AliveFirst Appearance:Just Another Girl on the MTAPortrayed By:Emily Alyn Lind  Audrey Hopeis a main character in theGossip Girl revival. She is portrayed byEmily Alyn Lind. Audrey Hope is described as the perfect friend and a loving daughter with a troubled home life.  She has poise and competence, and is rarely fazed by the tedium of life and drama. She emanates grace and elegance. She is reticent, but calculating. Audrey knows how to pick her battles and friends. Although her icy exterior may sometimes convey otherwise, she enjoys exploring new things and finding unconventional pleasures. Unlike her friends, she doesn't use social media as much, but enjoys reading books instead. Winning is not a part of her vocabulary. She knows who she is. When she gets dressed in the morning, it's for herself - not for the world. Despite her nonchalant nature, Audrey experiences an inner turmoil when her relationship with Aki begins to bore her and inadvertently looks for new paths to find new spices and excitement, while on the same hand her relationship with her mother Kiki is strained with her mother's depressive state and later accidental overdose. She feels guilty for finding pleasure with Max, and even more so for enjoying it. She's upset and frustrated by her mother's lack of effort to support her daughter and inability to move forward from the divorce, feeling neglected and helpless with her mother's struggles with depression. However, after feeling the same neglect and loneliness, Audrey understands her mother on a deeper level and is terrified when Kiki almost loses her life. Her perfectionist nature keeps her at the hospital, desperately attempting to control the environment to alleviate her mother's fight for her life. Due to her relief and newfound appreciation at life, Audrey makes the brave step to make amends with not just her mother, but takes a step in the wild side with Aki and Max.

"That girl is fiercely strong. Independent. Outspoken. Beautiful. Capable of anything...and no man or magazine should be able to take that away from her." -Dan Humphrey Despite leading a privileged and prominent lifestyle, Blair is generally characterized as a comical overachiever. At times, Blair's ambition can lead her to embrace a haughty and scheming side. Generally speaking, Blair is ruled by her insecurities, despite a confident exterior, usually caused by her feeling inferior to Serena. While she's regarded as being extremely knowledgeable, Blair seldom leaves success to chance, or to her own talents, and usually works to sabotage her competition. Typically, Blair finds rivals in most females, including (and sometimes especially) Serena, her best friend. A result of this insecurity, Blair does not trust easily, and when she does is always tremendously hurt when she feels betrayed. However, despite her manipulative and often ruthless behavior, she is revealed to have a sensitive and loving nature as well. characters.description: Bree BuckleyGeneral OverviewFull name:Bree BuckleyBirthplace:TexasRelationshipsFamily:Jeb Buckley(Paternal grandfather)P.J. Buckley(Cousin)Beth Buckley(Cousin)Romances:Nate Archibald(Ex-boyfriend)Friends:Chuck Bass(Ally)Enemies:Archibald familyvan der Bilt familyCarter BaizenSeries InformationStatus:AliveFirst Appearance:"Reversals of Fortune"Last Appearance:"Rufus Getting Married"Portrayed By:Joanna Garcia Bree Buckleyis a recurring character inseason threeof theGossip Girl television adaptation. She is portrayed by Joanna Garcia. Bree first appears in the season premiereReversals of Fortune, as a new love interest whomNate Archibaldmet over the summer. Once they arrive back in New York, they learn that their families are political rivals. As a result, they stay away from each other until Nate decides a way to rebel against thevan der Biltsis to hang out with Bree at their charity polo match. He brings her and introduces her to his grandfather,William van der Bilt. After she realizes what he's doing, she asks him to keep their relationship on the down low because her family isn't speaking to her and she wants to change that. She explains that her cousinBeth Buckley, who she is very close to, was stood up at the altar and she was off rebelling and not being there for her

characters.name: Brett Messerschmidt
characters.description: Brett MesserschmidtGeneral OverviewFull nameBrett Lenore MesserschmidtNicknamesBBirthplaceNew JerseyOccupationWaverly AcademyStudent (Graduated)RelationshipsFamilyUnnamed fatherUnnamed motherRomancesJeremiah Mortimer (ex-boyfriend)Eric Dalton (fling)Kara Whalen(ex-girlfriend)Sebastian ValentiFriendsCallie VernonTinsley CarmichaelJenny HumphreyBook informationStatusAlive Brett Lenore Messerschmidtis a character inThe It Girl (novel series). Smart, driven and an all-rounder aiming to get into Brown,Brett Lenore Messerschmidtis among Waverly's elite. She stands out from her aristocratic classmates due to her jaded appearance: her hair is dyed red and she habitually wears seven gold earrings in one of her ears. She loves Dorothy Parker and often quotes the author to herself. Brett claims to have lost her virginity and that her parents are doctors who run an organic farm in East Hampton but in actuality, she is a virgin and her parents are nouveaux riches from New Jersey (her father being a plastic surgeon). Brett is the junior class prefect and a member of the Disciplinary Committee.

characters.name: Callie Vernon
characters.description: Callie VernonGeneral OverviewFull nameCallie VernonNicknamesCBirthplaceUpstate New York, NYOccupationWaverly AcademyStudentRelationshipsRomancesBrandon Buchanan(ex-boyfriend)Easy Walsh(boyfriend)FriendsBrett MesserschmidtTinsley CarmichaelJenny HumphreyBook informationStatusAlive Callie Vernonis a character inThe It Girl (novel series). With strawberry-blond hair and warm hazel eyes,Callie Vernon’s all-preppy look suits her position as daughter of the governor of Georgia. Prior to the beginning of the series, Callie was best friends withBrett MesserschmidtandTinsley Carmichael, and the three of them were the most popular girls at Waverly. However, they got caught taking ecstasy during their sophomore year, which resulted in the expulsion of Tinsley and the probation of Brett and Callie.

characters.name: Camille de Haan
characters.description: Camille de HaanGeneral OverviewFull name:Camille de HaanBirthday:Mid 40sOccupation(s):BiotechnicianRelationshipsFamily:Monet de Haan(daughter)Unnamed ChildRomances:Greyson de Haan(husband)Jen(paramour)Enemies:Kate KellerGossip GirlNick LottZoya LottSeries InformationStatus:AliveFirst Appearance:Gossip Gone, GirlLast Appearance:I Know What You Did Last SummitPortrayed By:Amanda Warren Camille de Haanis a guest character in theGossip Girl revival. She is portrayed by Amanda Warren. The confident, wealthy, and positively scary mother ofMonet, Camille is everything her daughter wants to be - and everything she isn't. Camille is a strong, independent, grossly rich woman who demands the respect she deserves and then some. She knows her power and doesn't flaunt it often. Instead, she leverages it when needed. She bribesConstance Billard St. Jude's Schoolinto giving Monet the best grades, ensuring her daughter wants for nothing. She unintentionally creates a privileged, expectant, spoiled girl who bullies her way to the top. Camille does not hesitate to read her daughter down, publicly or privately. She honors tradition and the roles she must play in high society, and is humiliated by Monet's disregard for them during the deb ball. As shown during her conversation with Monet after the spectacle she had caused, there is a limit to how much Camile is willing to tolerate of Monet's antics, as shown where she angrily rebuked and scolded her for invitingDavis Callowayto the debutante ball in light of his new status as a sexual predator for the sake of humiliatingJulien Calloway, Monet's best friend. As shown, Camille was disgusted by Monet's actions and was further angered when the latter stated how she was "inspired" by her mother's words and example in guiding her actions. In this conversation, Camille  expressed her disappointment, anger and frustration in Monet putting more focus on how she looked instead of who she was, showing that while covering for her and hiding her daughter's poor academic abilities and problematic behavior, Camille disgusted by them and makes it known that she is in truth, embarrassed by her daughter and desires for her to improve herself internally instead of just making herself look good externally.

characters.name: Carol Rhodes
characters.description: Carol RhodesGeneral OverviewFull name:Carol RhodesBirthday:Early 1960sRelationshipsFamily:Lola Rhodes(daughter)CeCeandRichard Rhodes(Parents)Lily van der Woodsen(Sister)Serena van der Woodsen(Niece)Eric van der Woodsen(Nephew)Scott Rosson(Biological Nephew)Dan Humphrey(Nephew-in-law via Serena)Chuck Bass(Adoptive Nephew)Blair Waldorf(Adoptive Niece-in-law via Chuck)Romances:William van der Woodsen(affair; 1 child)Enemies:Lily van der WoodsenIvy DickensSeries InformationStatus:AliveFirst Appearance:Valley GirlsLast Appearance:The Return of the RingPortrayed By:Sheila KelleyKrysten Ritter (Young 20's)Carol Andrea Rhodesis the older sister ofLily van der Woodsen, and daughter ofCeCeandRick Rhodes. A rebellious teen, Carol moved to LA after her parents' divorce to find fame and become an actress. She has one daughter,Charlotte 'Charlie' Rhodes, aka Lola. Lily mentions that Carol lives in Miami. She claims Eric went to visit Carol to hide the fact he was atThe Ostroff Center. In a flashback episode (Valley Girls), it's revealed that after Lily was expelled from her school in Santa Barbara, California. She went to LA to find Carol, who had abandoned the family to become an actress. The two lived together in LA for a while but eventually had a falling out and  Lily left.

characters.name: CeCe Rhodes
characters.description: CeCe RhodesGeneral OverviewFull name:Celia Catherine Alison Rhodes (neé Fitzgerald)Nickname(s):CeCeBirthplace:Montecito, CaliforniaBirthday:Early 1940sRelationshipsFamily:Richard "Rick" Rhodes(ex-husband)Carol Rhodes(daughter, with Rick)Lillian "Lily" Rhodes(daughter, with Rick)Serena van der Woodsen(granddaughter, viaLily)Eric van der Woodsen(grandson, viaLily)Scott Rosson(biological grandson, viaLily)Charles "Chuck" Bartholomew Bass(adoptive grandson, viaLily)William van der Woodsen(son-in-law, viaLily)Romances:Rick Rhodes(ex-husband)Friends:Ivy DickensWilliam van der WoodsenEnemies:Humphrey family(former)Series InformationStatus:DeceasedFirst Appearance:Hi, SocietyLast Appearance:Cross RhodesPortrayed By:Caroline LagerfeltCynthia Watros(Gossip Girl: "Valley Girls")Celia "Cece" Rhodes(néeFitzgerald) is a recurring character in theGossip Girl television adaptation. She is the mother ofCarol RhodesandLily van der Woodsenand grandmother toSerenaandEric van der Woodsen,Chuck Bass,ScottRossonandLola Rhodes. Cecily resided inMontecito, Californiabefore moving into her Hamptons house when she became sick. She was the chairwoman of the debutante balls on the Upper East Side for fifteen years. She was previously married toRick Rhodes, and the two lived with their daughtersCaroland Lily in both New York City, New York and Montecito, California. Cecily makes her first appearance inHi, Society, when she visits town to attendSerena's Cotillion and Debutante Ball. Upon arriving, she is disappointed to learn that not only is Serena not planning to attend the ball, she is also dating the son of Lily's former boyfriend,Rufus Humphrey. That evening, she tells Lily that her doctor found something in her lungs and she might be very sick. Upset, Lily agrees right away to make Serena attend the ball. After Serena agrees to go, Cecily tries to convince her to go withCarter Baizeninstead ofDan Humphrey. She tells off Dan, which only encourages him to tell Serena that he will escort her. After he does so, she tries to bribe Rufus into making sure Dan doesn't go. He refuses, and tells Dan what she did. He tells Serena, who doesn't believe him; and they decide not to go to the ball together. At the ball, Serena learns from Carter that Cecily set it up for them to of together weeks ago; and that she isn't really sick. She confronts Cecily, who admits she lied about maybe being sick to make sure Serena went.

characters.name: Chuck Bass
characters.description: Chuck BassGeneral OverviewFull name:Charles Bartholomew BassNickname(s):ChuckHenry Prince(Alias)CBass Jr.Birthplace:Manhattan,New York City, NYBirthday:January 19, 1991Occupation(s):High school student(atSt. Jude's; graduated)EntrepreneurSocialiteRelationshipsFamily:Blair Waldorf(wife; 1 child)Henry Bass(son, withBlair Waldorf)Bartholomew "Bart" Bass(father; deceased)Evelyn Bass(mother)Lillian "Lily" van der Woodsen(adoptive mother/stepmother)Serena van der Woodsen(adoptive sister/stepsister)Eric van der Woodsen(adoptive brother/stepbrother)Jenny Humphrey(adoptive sister)Dan Humphrey(adoptive brother)Jack Bass(paternal uncle)CeCeandRick Rhodes(adoptive grandparents)Romances:Blair Waldorf(wife)Vanessa Abrams(one-night-stand)Elle(fling)Eva Coupeau(ex-girlfriend)Raina Thorpe(ex-girlfriend)Jenny Humphrey(one-night stand)Georgina Sparks(one-night stand, lost virginity to)Alessandra Steele(fling)Josh Ellis(kissed)Friends:Nate Archibald(best friend)Blair WaldorfSerena van der WoodsenJenny HumphreyDan Humphrey(frenemies)Enemies:Louis GrimaldiCarter BaizenRussell ThorpeBart BassSeries InformationStatus:AliveFirst Appearance:PilotLast Appearance:New York, I Love You XOXOPortrayed By:Ed Westwick Henry Prince(Alias)CBass Jr. Chuck is very sleazy, self centered, and has a horny sense of humor. However, he is also shown to be very loyal to the select few he deems worthy, such as offering a loan for Nate and Anne Archibald and paying Blair's dowry. Throughout the first season he displayed a variety of near-sociopathic tendancies including attempted rape but in later seasons has matured into a respectable young adult. He is extravagant and often times throws around money but it seems to come from deeply rooted insecurities which were most likely instilled by his demanding father. He is also very witty and quick to verbally spar, showing that he is quite intelligent. His narcissism is apparent, often quoting"I'm Chuck Bass"after someone asks him a question on why he is deserving of such things (e.g Ivy League education).
